mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ACCOUNT ( NO, ID, PWD,NAME,EMAIL, PHONE, GENDER, REG_DATE, ROLE, BIRTH, REGION, PROVIDER,NICKNAME ) VALUES ( SEQ_NO.NEXTVAL, #{id}, #{pwd}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{gender}, SYSDATE, #{role}, #{birth}, #{region}, #{provider}, #{nickname} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE ID = #{id} AND PROVIDER = #{provider}
SELECT * FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND PROVIDER = #{provider}
SELECT * FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE ID = #{id} AND EMAIL = #{email} AND PROVIDER = #{provider}
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_ACCOUNT SET PWD = #{pwd} WHERE ID = #{id} AND PROVIDER = #{provider}
